nasb.text: “It was said, ‘Whoever sends his wife away, let him give her a certificate of divorce’;

esv.text: “It was also said,     ‘Whoever divorces his wife, let him give her a certificate of divorce.’

cnv.text: “又有這樣的吩咐：‘人若休妻，就應當給她休書。’

ccb.text: “还有话说，‘人若休妻，必须给她休书’。

csbs.text: “又有吩咐：‘如果有人休妻，要给妻子一份休书。’
